Comment: orcast forecast orchestrator. Runs ingest -> fit+gate -> (if gates pass) draft promotion -> human sign-off -> apply promotion. Each Task wraps an existing function; ARNs are placeholders resolved by infra/aws/template.yaml. See docs/devpost/H0_ARCHITECTURE.md.

Ingest.Comment: Pull external sources + community-approved sightings into the time-series store (wraps state.run_ingestion + ingest_timeseries.refresh_recent).

FreezeSnapshot.Comment: Pin ingest outputs into snapshot_manifest.json before fitting (wraps modeling.fit_kernels.freeze_dataset_snapshot).

FitAndGate.Comment: Build design, fit the LNP kernels, run every fitness gate, emit fitted_kernels.json + fit_report.json (wraps modeling.fit_kernels.run_fit).

GatesPassed?.Comment: Automated gates are necessary but not sufficient; a passing fit is only eligible for promotion, not auto-promoted.

DraftPromotion.Comment: Bedrock promotion supervisor drafts a structured promote/hold recommendation citing gate evidence (wraps promotion.supervisor; deterministic fallback if Bedrock is unavailable).

AwaitHumanDecision.Comment: Pause for the consequential human step. The reviewer reads the recommendation + raw gates in the UI and POSTs /api/decision-records, which calls SendTaskSuccess/SendTaskFailure with this token.

ApplyPromotion.Comment: Promote the displayed confidence for the approved fit and write the immutable decision record (wraps the promote handler + decision-records table).

HoldLowConfidence.Comment: Forecast stays the default surface but broad/low-confidence. The gates raise confidence over time; they never flip a visibility switch.
